description: Wraps one child with native WPF padding, border, background, and corner styling.

padding.description: Inner WPF Thickness between the border edge and its content.

margin.description: Outer WPF Thickness separating this surface from adjacent layout.

borderThickness.description: WPF Thickness of the visible border on each edge.

cornerRadius.description: Corner radius applied to the surface border.

background.description: Brush value or resource expression used for the surface background.

borderBrush.description: Brush value or resource expression used for the border stroke.

maxWidth.description: Maximum rendered width in device-independent pixels.

minHeight.description: Minimum rendered height in device-independent pixels.

content.description: Single child rendered inside the bordered surface.
